a "loser" is a derogatory term for someone seen as habitually unsuccessful, incompetent, socially awkward, or generally lacking in desirable qualities like drive, status, or friends, often implying they are a misfit or someone to be looked down upon. While it can mean someone who loses a game, its informal usage focuses on personal failure or being a perpetual underdog, though some groups have reclaimed it as a badge of anti-conformity.

Loser core — is a TikTok-driven fashion aesthetic and subculture that embraces a "rebellious," intentionally unpolished, and nostalgic style inspired by 1990s and 2000s grunge, emo, and suburban skater culture. It rejects polished, high-fashion looks, favoring messy, comfortable, and often thrifted clothing items like baggy hoodies, jorts, and worn-out sneakers.
